segments.text: Hear me when I call, O God of my righteousness! You have relieved me in my distress; Have mercy on me, and hear my prayer.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How long, O you sons of men, Will you turn my glory to shame? How long will you love worthlessness And seek falsehood?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: the Lord has set apart for Himself him who is godly; The Lord will hear when I call to Him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Be angry, and do not sin. Meditate within your heart on your bed, and be still.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Offer the sacrifices of righteousness, And put your trust in the Lord.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who will show us any good?
segments.speaker: Many people

segments.text: Lord, lift up the light of Your countenance upon us.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have put gladness in my heart, More than in the season that their grain and wine increased.
I will both lie down in peace, and sleep; For You alone, O Lord, make me dwell in safety.
segments.speaker: David
